# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch snapshot configuration
snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: "my-elasticsearch-backups"
        region: "us-east-1"
        access_key: "REDACTED"
        secret_key: "REDACTED"
        chunk_size: "1g"
        compress: true
        server_side_encryption: true
        readonly: false
    file:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: "/backup/elasticsearch"
        compress: true
        chunk_size: "1g"
        readonly: false

  # Snapshot schedule configuration
  schedule:
    - name: "daily_backup"
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      repository: "s3"
      retention:
        keep_last: 7
        delete_older_than: "30d"
    - name: "weekly_backup"
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      repository: "file"
      retention:
        keep_last: 4
        delete_older_than: "90d"

  # Snapshot creation configuration
  create:
    enabled: true
    concurrent_snapshots: 2
    wait_for_completion: true
    timeout: "1h"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false

  # Snapshot restoration configuration
  restore:
    enabled: true
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
    wait_for_completion: true
    timeout: "2h"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false

# Backup operations configuration
operations:
  monitoring:
    enabled: true
    alert_threshold: 90
    notification:
      email:
        recipients: ["ops-team@company.com"]
        subject: "Elasticsearch Backup Alert"
  logging:
    level: "info"
    file: "/var/log/elasticsearch/backups.log"
    rotation:
      max_size: "100mb"
      max_files: 5
